attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 replace(replace(replace(ESPV.USAGE_DESCRIPTION,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),' ') USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
 ESPV.DEPT_NO,
 ESPV.DEPT_ID,
 ESPV.DEPT_NAME,
 ESPV.ACTIVE_INDICATOR,
 ESPV.PUBLISHED_STATUS,
 ESPV.RECLASS_DEPT,
 ESPV.RECLASS_DEPT_NAME,
 ESPV.RECLASS_DATE,
 ESPV.COUNTRY_CODE,
 ESPV.COUNTRY_DESC,
 ESPV.COUNTRY_ID,
 ESPV.COUNTRY_ROLLUP,
 ESPV.LOCATION_CODE,
 ESPV.LOCATION_DESC,
 ESPV.LOCATION_ID,
 ESPV.FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_CODE,
 ESPV.FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_DESC,
 ESPV.FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,
 ESPV.PL_DESC,
 ESPV.PL_NODE_ID,
 ESPV.PL_PARENT_DESC,
 ESPV.PL_PARENT_ID,
 ESPV.VP_DESC,
 ESPV.VP_NODE_ID,
 ESPV.VP_EMP_ID,
 ESPV.SR_VP_DESC,
 ESPV.SR_VP_NODE_ID,
 ESPV.SR_VP_EMP_ID,
 ESPV.MANAGER_FULL_NAME,
 ESPV.MANAGER_NODE_ID,
 ESPV.MANAGER_EMP_ID,
 ESPV.LEGAL_DESC,
 ESPV.LEGAL_CODE,
 ESPV.LEGAL_ID,
 ESPV.THEATER_DESC,
 ESPV.THEATER_CODE,
 ESPV.THEATER_ID,
 ESPV.FA_FULLNAME,
 ESPV.FA_EMAIL,
 ESPV.FA_EMP_ID,
 ESPV.PILLAR_ROLLUP,
 ESPV.PILLAR_CODE,
 ESPV.PILLAR_ID,
 ESPV.HR_MAN_FULLNAME,
 ESPV.HR_MAN_EMAIL,
 ESPV.HR_MAN_EMP_ID,
 ESPV.CURRENCY_DESC,
 ESPV.CURRENCY_CODE,
 ESPV.CURRENCY_ID,
 ESPV.REGION_DESC,
 ESPV.REGION_CODE,
 ESPV.REGION_ID,
 ESPV.DEPT_CLASS,
 ESPV.EST_HEADCOUNT,
 ESPV.AUTO_APPROVE,
 ESPV.CREATION_DATE,
 ESPV.CREATED_BY,
 ESPV.DEPT_UPDATE_DATE,
 ESPV.DEPT_UPDATED_BY,
 ESPV.ROLLUP_UPDATE_DATE,
 ESPV.ROLLUP_UPDATED_BY,
 ESPV.LOB_ID,
 ESPV.LOB_DESC,
 ESPV.LOB_CODE,
 ESPV.ARIBA_REQ_THRESHOLD,
 ESPV.EST_BUDGET,
 ESPV.PUBLISHED_DATE,
 ESPV.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
 ESPV.BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE,
 ESPV.BUSINESS_UNIT_DESC,
 ESPV.TAX_CATEGORY_ID,
 ESPV.TAX_CATEGORY_CODE,
 ESPV.TAX_CATEGORY_DESC,
 ESPV.CONTROLLER_ID,
 ESPV.CONTROLLER_NAME,
 ESPV.CFP_MANAGER_ID,
 ESPV.CFP_MANAGER_NAME,
 ESPV.CHANGE_TYPE,
 ESPV.MARKET_LOB_ID,
 ESPV.MARKET_LOB_CODE,
 ESPV.MARKET_LOB_DESC,
 ESPV.START_DATE,
 ESPV.END_DATE 
FROM
EDW_SI_PUBLISHED_V ESPV
WHERE
 ESPV.PUBLISHED_DATE >TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY  HH24:MI:SS')
